what_it_does: Defines a reusable voice and visual style system for generative content, including identity principles, adjustable dials, visual rules, verbal rules, machine prompts, design tokens, guardrails, and quality gates.
observations: Frames the identity as a blend of luxury aspiration, technical precision, and calm trust.
Uses four shared traits across visual and verbal output: restraint, warmth, precision, and momentum.
Defines adjustable dials for warmth, register, density, and modality.
Specifies material, light, colour, surface, depth, icon, diagram, motion, component, and typography rules.
Defines verbal patterns around present-tense active language, first-person plural, compressed claims, short fragments, and numbers as sentence carriers.
Includes paste-ready prompts for image, layout/UI/slide, and copy generation.
Includes machine-readable YAML tokens for colours, radii, shadows, icon rules, texture, and dials.
Ends with quality gates for judging whether generated output stays on-DNA.
standouts: The same identity logic is applied to pixels and words rather than treating copy as a separate layer.
Gold is governed as rare punctuation rather than a general brand fill.
The system includes both human-readable rationale and machine-facing prompts/tokens.
Relational diagram primitives are treated as reusable identity language.
The warm end depends on rendered material and golden-hour light rather than flat colour gradients.
conventions: Uses numbered sections from essence through quality gates.
Separates human interpretation from machine-facing generation kit.
Expresses design rules as dials, invariants, tokens, and negative constraints.
Combines prose guidance, tables, code blocks, YAML, and prompt snippets.
Uses assertive constraint language such as hard rules, fail conditions, and invariants.
Marks some uncertain items as assumptions in prose.
concerns: The opening says anything marked with the assumption marker should be corrected first, but the body mostly describes assumptions in prose rather than consistently marking them inline.
The document refers to an extracted source artifact without naming or describing the source evidence available inside this file.
The generation kit is broad enough that implementers may need separate examples for specific output types beyond the neutral exemplars included here.
notes: Brief someone that this file is a complete parametric design DNA spec for generating consistent visual and verbal content.
questions: What was the source artifact used for extraction?
Which exact typeface is confirmed for production use?
What is the confirmed brand mark that occupies the sharp-mark and hub roles?
Who or what process sets warmth, register, density, and modality for a given task?
Which assumptions have been corrected since v1, if any?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the actual content: it documents a reusable visual and verbal identity and provides machine-facing generation assets plus quality gates.
intention_signals: It seems intended to turn an extracted design and copy style into a controllable generative system that can produce varied outputs while preserving recognizable identity constraints.
novelty: Distinctive elements include the unified visual-verbal root, warmth/register/density/modality dials, gold-as-punctuation rule, relational diagram grammar, and direct pairing of machine prompts with human quality gates.
contribution: Contributes a structured identity layer a fused system would keep as a source of visual tokens, material rules, voice cadence, layout grammar, diagram primitives, generation prompts, negative constraints, and quality checks.
summary_for_embedding: A Design DNA specification defining a parametric warm architectural visual language and concise active verbal voice for generative content, with dials, invariants, tokens, prompts, and quality gates.
intention_for_embedding: This was for guiding AI content generation so visual layouts, images, and copy maintain one consistent premium, precise, calm identity.
